rationale: The cited paper appears in a grouped citation in the measurement section to note that trade-ins make dealer profit accounting more complex. The citing paper does not engage Kim et al. (2011)'s core theory or findings, and its key hypotheses about transparency, trust, and back-end profits are developed independently. When specifying the actual trade-in profit operationalization, the paper points mainly to other references, so this citation functions as broad background rather than a distinct building block.
